content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule from multiple angles, I can confirm the neighbour atoms of atom index 0 (C:0).

## Results:

**Atom 0 (C)** has **3 neighbour atoms**:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 1 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 25 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 27 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 3922

The carbon atom at index 0 is covalently bonded to one nitrogen atom (N:1) and two hydrogen atoms (H:25 and H:27), forming a typical CH₂-N moiety where carbon has 4 bonds (1 to nitrogen and 2 to hydrogens, with the 4th bond being to the hydrogen shown as H:25 in one view).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 0, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
